subcodes.first_line: O Hasan! Thy letter hath reached the presence of the Wronged One, and whatsoever was mentioned therein hath attained unto the honor of being heard by the Lord of Names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسن نامه ات نزد مظلوم حاضر و آنچه در او مذکور بشرف اصغاء مالک اسما فائز
subcodes.subjects: @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @love of God
